scripts.start: npm config set registry https://registry.npmmirror.com && npm config set disturl https://npmmirror.com/mirrors/node && npm install -g typescript@4.7.4 @types/node@18.0.0 ts-node@10.8.1 cross-env@7.0.3 && cross-env TS_NODE_SKIP_PROJECT=true ts-node bin/react_test_open.ts
scripts.test: npm config set registry https://registry.npmmirror.com && npm config set disturl https://npmmirror.com/mirrors/node && npm install -g typescript@4.7.4 @types/node@18.0.0 ts-node@10.8.1 cross-env@7.0.3 && cross-env TS_NODE_SKIP_PROJECT=true ts-node bin/react_test_run.ts
